changed: Recorded secret-safe provider env boolean checks for SYNTH-200.
required_user_action: Provide one provider API key through environment only, e.g. GEMINI_API_KEY or GOOGLE_API_KEY for Gemini, or OPENAI_API_KEY for OpenAI. Do not paste key values into docs or chat logs.
why: Provider-backed generation can only resume if at least one external LLM API key env var is present; key values must never be printed or documented.
